title: Finding Genuine Cels
wikitext: []: Finding Genuine Cels             Quote Post by Cora » Thu Jul 11, 2024 3:12 pm I am seeing a bunch of listings for "production cels" for the eva tv series and eoe on sites like Jauce and Mandarake. I'm particularly interested in this listing on Jauce: https://www.jauce.com/auction/t1033448362 . Are listing like this for genuine cels, or are they just reproduction cels? The cel I linked is a scene from eoe... did they even release cel reproductions for eoe? Is it just impossible to find genuine cels at all?
